reviews.review_description: Can’t even turn the volume on the instructor down to 0. I don’t want an instructor at all. I just want to be solo with scenery. Apparently this isn’t possible, even though it once was.

developer_response.body:
Hi thesrabbit,

Kinneta has always allowed to bring instructor volume down to 0, but the app doesn't allow users to remove instructor visuals from the workouts (instructors are the key element of the product).

To turn the volume on the instructor down to 0, you can press pause on the virtual control panel while in a session. A menu will then pop up which will have "Trainer Volume" on the left hand side. You can press the left arrow with your index finger or controller to bring the instructor's volume down. This menu is also accessible on the settings page of the home screen.

Please don't hesitate to reach out to us directly at support@kinnetafitness.com for additional assistance.

Sincerely,
The Kinneta Team

reviews.review_description: I use this app with my exercise bike at home and have made it a part of my regular routine. In the past I’ve used mobile fitness apps with my rides but this app really takes the experience up several notches. I feel like I can remove myself from the  boredom of my home environment to have structured workouts with a bunch of different trainers. It’s helped with my motivation and routine. Looking forward to what’s next.

Kinneta boosts engagement in at-home fitness sessions with instructors, your choice of music and wonderful visuals. No such thing as home alone when you've got an instructor guiding you on a ride up a mountain or through a forest. Just slip on a headset and you're in another world with a companion doing a work-out, it's fantastic!!

developer_response.body:
Hi KungfuMama2,

We're excited to hear you're enjoying Kinneta! We'll pass along your feedback to our awesome team of fitness instructors!

Sincerely,
The Kinneta Team

reviews.review_title: One of the Best VR Fitness Apps Availabl
reviews.review_description: Kinneta is an excellent VR fitness app that I would recommend to anyone who enjoys both fitness and virtual reality. It’s polished, easy to use, and offers a great selection of environments and trainers. With both mixed reality and fully immersive VR modes, it adapts well to different workout styles. The intuitive UI makes it easy to jump in and stay focused, making Kinneta one of the most enjoyable VR fitness experiences available.
This is a great app. I like the instructor's and the backgrounds are nice but could use a little more animation.

This app has been a real joy to use on my exercise bike. I like how they keep releasing new workouts every week, which keeps the experience fresh for me. And it’s cool how they allow me to see my legs and feet on the pedals while I work out. So I’m both in VR and also can see the real world thanks to passthrough. And to mix things up, I also get an upper body workout with the hand gesture elements. Highly recommend!

reviews.review_title: Wow they made some great improvements
reviews.review_description: When I first saw the advertisement, I was thrilled to try it. I loved the guides, the stunning landscapes. The mixed reality instructor in my room made the experience look incredible in VR. They now have an interface to the cadence sensor on my stationary recumbent bike and it works great. 😊 The instructors push me to go faster and harder to get a great workout. My only recommendation is to add a feature to select different music styles. All in all, it is a great biking VR workout app. 😊

developer_response.body:
Hi PeteyPieCa,

Awesome to hear that you're getting a great workout with the app! And thanks for your feedback about the music. Our team will review and see how we can implement it.

Sincerely,
The Kinneta team

reviews.review_description: Since your app cannot connect to Echelon or pelican bikes yet do you have an app I can download that can be put on my SmartWatch or cell phone?

developer_response.body:
Hi QueenRae73,

Thanks for using Kinneta. Unfortunately, some Bluetooth-enabled bikes like Peloton and Echelon are locked by manufacturers and not able to connect with 3rd party apps like ours, but we are working with the manufacturers to offer this feature on their bikes in the future.

Our app is compatible with all bikes however in Non-Connected Mode. Many of our users interact with this mode and have given us positive reviews with their experience. We highly recommend you try this and let us know what you think.

You also have the option to use our experimental cadence sensor feature for to track your cadence in real time. We recommend this one: https://www.amazon.com/Magene-Cycling-Cadence-Buletooth-Wireless/dp/B08252X8VS.

We hope this helps. If you have any additional questions, please reach out to us at support@kinnetafitness.com.

Sincerely,
The Kinneta Team

reviews.review_description:
I can type in my email address, but it won’t let me enter it. I click on the enter button and nothing.
Can’t do my email, can’t do a password or user name.
I uninstalled the app and retried and still can’t put in my info.
Giving it 1 star and will change that once I am able to rate the app as an active user.
Thank you, hope for a quick response 
Dawn


UPDATE 
Your update date fixed my issue as far as being able to enter text. My problem now, is because I kept trying to enter my email address now it’s saying that email is already in use. That’s my only email and it’s mine, even though it says it’s in use. So I can’t finish my sign up very frustrating

UPDATE 
All set up and loving it so far. I am not fully up to  the speed for cycling but I will get there

developer_response.body:
Hi DawnTully,

Glad to hear that! If you have any additional questions, feel free to reach out to us at support@kinnetafitness.com.

Sincerely,
The Kinneta Team

reviews.review_description: I'm into treadmill running, so I decided to check it out. What I liked is great trainers and high quality visuals (both trainers and real world places). The picture is not moving though: i.e. you are on a treadmill with the instructor right next to you and you exercise together just like you would do say in Peloton app but in 3D and with constantly changing scenery. One cool feature I liked is that you can just switch to passthrough in the app and you get your trainer right in the middle of your room, kind of a private home lesson. The instructor looked realistic and to scale and "glued" to the floor. So this feature is really cool. The trainers are pre-recorded so there is no real-time feedback. Some type of AI-driven interaction is one thing I would love to see in this App.

developer_response.body:
Hi kmay96677,

Thanks for your feedback! We're so happy to hear you're enjoying Kinneta. We appreciate your idea about AI interaction and will look closely into it.

Sincerely,
The Kinneta Team

reviews.review_description: I exercise regularly but sometimes it’s hard to motivate myself because it’s not always the most enjoyable experience. With this app though I see myself actually enjoying my cardio workouts. There’s a selection of good trainers and a long list of different classes to choose from. And the environments takes me to cool places, away from my home environment. Now I look forward to my exercises and my motivation is up. Any app that keeps me excited about working out is worth it for me.

developer_response.body:
Hi GlacialWalrus1290,

Glad to hear! We're focused on making the workout experience a ton of fun for everyone, so we really appreciate hearing stories like yours.

Sincerely,
The Kinneta Team

reviews.review_description: So glad I found Kinneta!  I have been looking for cardio workouts in VR and these check all the boxes.  I've tried both bike and treadmill...  The trainers are motivating and the worlds are really high quality - gorgeous and fully immersive!  Can't wait to try more!

developer_response.body:
Hi jenna.22369,

Likewise, we're so glad we can deliver cardio workouts your way! Keep a lookout for our new releases coming out every week.

Sincerely,
The Kinneta Team

reviews.review_description:
I am excited to use my treadmill with the program but have not found any instruction on how to setup the program with my environment. Can you direct me to how to get centered on my treadmill relative to the VR and instructor.  A guiding tutorial would have been helpful and I apologize if I somehow missed it.

Thanks

Jerry

developer_response.body:
Hi Jerry,

To center your treadmill relative to the instructor, press and hold the right meta button on your controller until the view recenters. While doing so, stand on your treadmill and look straight ahead. Additionally, you can adjust the view area for your real-world treadmill by aiming your controller at the blue and green spheres and pressing the trigger button to move them around.

You can also access video tutorials of these instructions in the app by pressing the book icon on the navigation bar under the list of classes.

We hope this helps, and if you continue to experience issues, please email us at support@kinnetafitness.com with more details.

Best,
The Kinneta Team

reviews.review_description: The classes so far have been amazing and I really enjoy the diverse number of environments they offer. I think the trainers look very realistic and they do a great job at guiding you through a workout at your own pace.

developer_response.body:
Hi pigeonnostrils,

We appreciate that! We're continuing to add to the variety of locations and workouts in our weekly releases, so be sure to check them out.

Sincerely,
The Kinneta Team

reviews.review_description: I love the concept of enjoying beautiful scenery while cycling—it adds a unique and enjoyable dimension to the experience. However, I find the subscription cost for this app too high given its current features. As it stands, I’d be willing to pay around $50 to $60 per year. If the app offered something more immersive, like having a trainer riding with us through stunning locations with a 360-degree view—similar to iFit bike rides—it would better justify the current pricing.

developer_response.body:
Hi Madievb,

Thanks for trying Kinneta. We’re glad you liked the app. Thank you for your suggestions on product and pricing! The price of the app is driven primarily by our investment in new workout releases every week. As for riding through 360 degree locations, current technology doesn’t allow for a photo realistic high quality experience, but we are working on it. In addition we’ll be adding other new features (gamification, leaderboards, and AI) as we continue developing the app. Again, thank you and we really value your feedback. If you have any other ideas, please don’t hesitate to reach out to us at support@kinnetafitness.com.

Sincerely,
The Kinneta Team

Hi Histiore,

We're excited to hear that! We release new workouts with new scenery every week -- please be sure to check them out.

Sincerely,
The Kinneta Team
